# Knight Group Handyman Services LLC
> Professional, registered & insured handyman services in Pinellas County, FL. Serving Safety Harbor, Clearwater, Dunedin, Palm Harbor, Largo, Tarpon Springs, and surrounding areas. 15+ years of experience.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.knightgroup.com
- Phone: +1-813-649-3341
- Email: nknight@knightgroup.com
- Address: 7th St S, Safety Harbor, FL 34695
- Service Area: Pinellas County, FL (Safety Harbor, Clearwater, Dunedin, Palm Harbor, Largo, Tarpon Springs, Oldsmar)
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8AM–5PM | Emergency: 24/7

## Services

### General Repairs
Drywall repair, hole patching, leak fixes, caulking, door hardware, cabinet adjustments, and general home maintenance throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/general-repairs

### Plumbing Services
Faucet and fixture replacement, toilet repair, shutoff valve replacement, water heater installation, drain clearing throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/plumbing-services

### Electrical Work
Outlet replacement, GFCI installation, ceiling fan installation, light fixture swaps, switch replacement throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/electrical-work

### Carpentry & Framing
Custom shelving, cabinet installation, trim and molding, door frame repair, deck repairs, wood rot replacement throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/carpentry-framing

### Painting & Finishing
Interior and exterior painting, texture matching, drywall finishing, priming, and accent walls throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/painting-finishing

### Home Renovations
Bathroom remodels, kitchen updates, flooring installation (LVP, tile, laminate), fixture upgrades throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/home-renovations

### Doors & Windows
Exterior door installation, storm door install, window replacement, frame repair, weatherstripping throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/doors-windows

### Custom Projects
Built-in shelves, entertainment centers, closet systems, outdoor storage, window seats, and specialty woodworking throughout Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/custom-projects

### Emergency Services (24/7)
Around-the-clock emergency home repairs for burst pipes, active leaks, storm damage, broken doors, and urgent electrical issues in Pinellas County.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/emergency-services

### Handyman Services (General)
Professional handyman services for all home repair and maintenance needs in Pinellas County, FL.
URL: https://www.knightgroup.com/Services/handyman
